transcript.text:
Alright Bill, let me dig into this. Odometer variance, huh? That can be a dealbreaker for some but I'll tell you what - if the Carfax aligns with the rest of the vehicle's condition, I might just roll with it. Especially considering the low miles.

The Executive Package and Driving Assistance Pro are big draws for our luxury crowd. And a sleek Black Sapphire exterior paired with a black interior? That's got high-end written all over it. What kind of deal were you looking at here? The vehicle sounds like it could be a great addition to my lot. 

But I need to know, is there an ETA for this beauty and what are your deposit terms looking like? Let me know more details and I can probably give you a verbal commitment right then and there. I'm ready to pull the trigger if everything checks out.

transcript.speaker: BILL
transcript.text:
Alright, so here's what we're working with. The MMR's at twenty-seven, but rBook comps are running forty-two to forty-three on similar miles and condition. I'm at thirty-one five, which puts you nine grand under rBook — strong spread for your retail floor.

Clean title, no frame or structural. The odo variance is flagged, but Carfax itself is clean otherwise. 

ETA — we can get this to you in three to five business days depending on transport. On deposit, that's typically thirty percent to lock it in, and we can work out the balance on arrival pending your inspection and title verification. Nothing unusual there.

Before I send you the full bid card — can I get that to you via text right now so you can run through all the specs and photos?

transcript.speaker: PARTNER
transcript.text:
Bill, I love where this is headed. Your spread of 9k under rBook is a solid deal for my retail floor. That odo variance flag shouldn't be an issue if Carfax aligns with the overall clean history you mentioned. The MMR at twenty-seven indicates a lower value, while your price accounts for that with room to breathe.

The three to five business day ETA works great — I can easily accommodate those timelines in my lot planning. And the deposit terms of thirty percent up front are standard and fair. 

Before we go any further though, I need to see that bid card myself. Send it over via text right now so I can review all specs and photos. I want to make sure this luxury ride checks out from top to bottom before committing.

If everything looks good on my end, I'll give you a verbal commitment today. I'm ready to seal the deal fast — just need that bid card in my hands pronto. Let's get it done!

transcript.speaker: BILL
transcript.text:
Okay, you should see it come through in a second. Full bid card with all the specs, iPacket sticker, Carfax details, the whole package.

Want to look it over while I'm still on the line with you, or you want to dial in and ring me back once you've had a chance to review?

transcript.speaker: PARTNER
transcript.text: Send it over now! I want to analyze it live. The thrill of the deal is too strong to put down the phone for this. I'll go over every detail with you as you send it through. Let's make this happen together, Bill. Trust me, once I see those specs and photos, we'll be ready to push this deal forward.

transcript.speaker: BILL
transcript.text:
Got it — you're looking at it now. Take your time going through it.

So what you're seeing is the full sticker breakdown. That Panoramic Sky Lounge LED roof, the multi-contour seats, Harman Kardon sound, the whole Executive Package — this thing is loaded. The Driving Assistance Pro package adds another layer of tech that'll move quick on your lot.

What's jumping out at you so far?

transcript.speaker: PARTNER
transcript.text:
Just scrolling through the iPacket now... damn, this one's got everything I love in a luxury ride. That Panoramic Sky Lounge LED roof is going to be a major draw — perfect for showing off on my lot. The multi-contour seats and Harman Kardon sound are top-tier features that'll make this car a must-have for luxury buyers.

The Driving Assistance Pro package also looks like it has some serious tech upgrades I know our customers will love and pay a premium for. Oh man, the specs match up with what you described perfectly.

And that rBook spread? That's just where we need to be for retail floor turnover. With these low miles and everything else aligned, this is shaping up to be one hell of an addition. I'm ready to commit — I won't let this one slip away. Let's dot the i's and cross the t's on the bid card details so we can get you that deposit right away. We're almost there!

transcript.speaker: BILL
transcript.text:
Excellent. So we're locked in on thirty-one five, clean title, three to five business days on transport. Thirty percent deposit to secure it.

One thing I want to make sure is crystal clear before we close — that odometer variance. The bid card flagged it at intake. Carfax shows fifty-five two eighty-three, our intake was fifty-nine eight. I know you said it wasn't a dealbreaker, but I want to confirm you're comfortable with that on your end before we move forward. No surprises when the title clears.

Are you good with that piece?

transcript.speaker: PARTNER
transcript.text:
Bill, after going through everything — Carfax aligning, the overall condition of the vehicle, our target price accounting for that variance... I'm totally fine with it. In fact, I think it's a smart move on your part to keep some extra profit buffer in there.

When a car looks this good and has as few miles as this one does, an odo variance like that is hardly a red flag. It's almost expected at our level of inventory. And after reviewing all the details you sent over, I'm 100% comfortable moving forward with this deal based on your full bid card.

Let's get you that deposit to lock it down. You've got yourself a buyer — I'm committed to making this happen. Just send me your bank info for the transfer so we can close this out today. The sooner this beauty is in my lot, the better!

transcript.speaker: BILL
transcript.text:
Awesome, Alex. I appreciate that. On the deposit — I'm gonna have one of our owners handle that side directly with you. They'll send over the wire instructions and lock in the timeline once they've got your deposit cleared. That way everything's buttoned up on both ends.

Oscar or one of the team will be reaching out to you within the next couple hours to finalize. They'll confirm the three to five day ETA, get your delivery address locked in, and walk through the title transfer process.

You're all set on our end. Good talking to you.

transcript.speaker: PARTNER
transcript.text:
No problem, Bill. I understand completely — having someone from their team handle the finances is standard protocol. I'm expecting that call from Oscar or whomever shortly. 

I'll be ready with my bank info and we can get your deposit cleared fast. The whole process sounds smooth from what you've outlined.

Once again, I want to commend you on this deal. It's a prime luxury vehicle and I know it's going to fly off my lot at the price point we agreed on. We're gonna make some serious cash together on this one.

Keep me posted if anything comes up in the meantime. But as far as I'm concerned, the deal is on track to close today. Let that ownership team do their thing so we can get this beauty inbound to my lot ASAP! Thanks again for the great find, Bill.

transcript.speaker: BILL
transcript.text: Talk soon, Alex.
